news.title: Coinbase intoduces AI advisor, stock options, and pre-IPO markets in finance push
Coinbase unveils ‘System Update’ unlocking an AI advisor, global unified liquidity, options trading and more
news.summary: Coinbase's latest System Update includes a new AI-powered advisor and global unified liquidity between its U.S. and international platforms.

news.title: Pump.fun activity craters 80% in three months, dragging Solana fees lower as traders rotate into perps
news.summary: The platform's fall from grace is best reflected in the PUMP token itself, which is down 40% in the last six months alone.

news.title: ChatGPT Is Still Huge, But Rival AI Chatbots Are Catching Up Fast
news.summary: Sensor Tower's State of AI 2026 report shows ChatGPT's audience share slipping below 50% for the first time, as Gemini's default-app advantage and Claude's Pentagon-fueled rally eat into OpenAI's lead.

news.title: FBI Says It Foiled Drone Attack Plot Targeting White House UFC Event
news.summary: Federal prosecutors allege five men planned to use explosive-laden drones and sniper teams to take out "high-value targets" at the UFC event.

news.title: Coinbase Gears Up to Launch Tokenized Stock Trading, Crypto and Equities Options
news.summary: Publicly traded crypto exchange Coinbase added to its feature set Tuesday as it seeks to become the "everything exchange."

news.title: Japan Rates Hit Three-Decade High, But No ‘Meaningful Disruption’ to Crypto Market
news.summary: Japan's central bank lifted rates to a level unseen in decades, a move that once shook crypto markets—yet prices barely stirred.

news.title: Bitcoin metric near ‘low-risk’ zone after holders absorb 125K BTC in June: Time for a rebound?
news.summary: Bitcoin’s Sharpe ratio and a 125,000 BTC increase in BTC accumulator demand mark the start of a new demand phase. Will prices follow?

news.title: Crypto PAC has $12M stake in Senate primary runoff as Alabama voters head to polls
news.summary: Defend American Jobs reported spending $7.4 million on media to support Republican Barry Moore ahead of his May 20 Alabama primary, and an additional $4.7 million before Tuesday’s runoffs.

news.title: Coinbase lets users transfer stock portfolios as exchange expands beyond crypto
news.summary: The crypto exchange is deepening its push into traditional finance by enabling ACATS stock transfers and expanding trading products beyond digital assets.

news.title: XRP whale wallet withdrawals top 720M as risk-adjusted return data points to opportunity
news.summary: Whales pulled more than 720 million XRP from exchanges, as various data points converge to predict a potential 50% rally.

news.title: 伊朗警告以色列停止黎南部军事行动
news.summary:
【伊朗警告以色列停止黎南部军事行动】金色财经报道，6月17日，伊朗武装部队哈塔姆·安比亚中央司令部发布声明称，在美国总统特朗普宣布战争结束后的两天里，以色列军队在黎巴嫩南部违反停火协议84次，继续对黎巴嫩无辜民众实施犯罪和屠杀。伊朗武装部队郑重警告：如果以色列不停止对黎巴嫩南部的侵略和挑衅行为，等待它的将是伊朗武装力量的强力回应。 (CCTV国际时讯)

原文链接: https://www.cls.cn/detail/2401702

news.title: 美伊框架协议拟设3000亿美元私人基金 以带动对伊投资
news.summary:
【美伊框架协议拟设3000亿美元私人基金 以带动对伊投资】金色财经报道，6月17日，据路透社报道，消息人士称，美伊框架协议包括一项设立3000亿美元私人基金的计划，以带动对伊朗的投资。3000亿美元的伊朗投资基金只有在最终协议签署后方可开始运作。该基金是一只私人投资工具，不涉及政府资金，且与关于海外被冻结的伊朗主权资产的谈判无关。该基金计划已获得来自美国、海湾阿拉伯国家、亚洲、南美和非洲公司的超过一半的资金承诺。

原文链接: https://flash.jin10.com/detail/20260617015627353800

news.title: 伊朗央行行长：谅解备忘录规定美有义务解冻伊资产
news.summary:
【伊朗央行行长：谅解备忘录规定美有义务解冻伊资产】金色财经报道，6月17日，伊朗中央银行行长阿卜杜勒纳赛尔·赫马提当地时间16日表示，关于伊美谅解备忘录框架下被冻结资产解冻问题，在相关条款的制定过程中，已充分考虑过去所有经验与历史案例，并努力确保协议中设定的机制能够提供最高程度的保障，以确保这些资金能够被顺利获取与使用。赫马提说，谅解备忘录条款已明确规定美国在解冻资产方面的义务，且这些义务具有清晰性和可执行性，美国方面将被要求履行其承诺。赫马提还强调，在谅解备忘录签署并开始执行后，将进行必要的技术与银行层面的核查，以验证资产是否真正解冻并可实际使用。赫马提表示，这些被解冻的资金属于伊朗中央银行资产，这些资金的管理、分配与使用方式，将在央行法定权限框架内决定。央行将根据国家需求、经济状况及外汇优先事项，对资金使用方式作出安排。 (央视新闻)

原文链接: https://www.cls.cn/detail/2401691

news.title: 美货运“龙”飞船脱离空间站返回地球
news.summary:
【美货运“龙”飞船脱离空间站返回地球】金色财经报道，6月17日，美国太空探索技术公司的货运“龙”飞船16日脱离国际空间站，携带科学实验样品和物资返回地球。据美国国家航空航天局介绍，“龙”飞船于美国东部时间16日12时25分（北京时间17日0时25分）脱离国际空间站，启程返回地球。按计划，“龙”飞船将于美国西部时间17日5时08分（北京时间同日20时08分）溅落在美加利福尼亚州附近海域。

原文链接: https://www.cls.cn/detail/2401694
